mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_ods_valuation_sheet_style ( id, task_id, file_id, sheet_name, style_scope, sheet_style_json, preview_row_count, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{taskId}, #{fileId}, #{sheetName}, #{styleScope}, #{sheetStyleJson}, #{previewRowCount}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, file_id, sheet_name, style_scope, sheet_style_json, preview_row_count, created_at FROM t_ods_valuation_sheet_style WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY sheet_name ASC, style_scope ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, task_id, file_id, sheet_name, style_scope, sheet_style_json, preview_row_count, created_at FROM t_ods_valuation_sheet_style WHERE file_id = #{fileId} ORDER BY sheet_name ASC, style_scope ASC, id ASC
